info.name: ServiceLens API — Task Manager Analysis
info.description:
Postman collection for ServiceLens — AI-powered code intelligence platform.
Target codebase: **Task Manager** (Spring Boot + MongoDB)

**Setup:**
1. Start ServiceLens on port 8080 (with Ollama, pgvector, Neo4j running)
2. Run Full Ingest to index the task-manager codebase
3. Use Query / Ask endpoints to explore the task-manager code

**Variables to configure:**
- `baseUrl` — ServiceLens host (default: http://localhost:8080)
- `serviceName` — logical name (default: task-manager)
- `repoPath` — absolute path to the task-manager repo on disk

item.name: Ingestion
item.description: Index the task-manager codebase into ServiceLens. Run Full Ingest first, then Incremental Ingest for subsequent runs.

request.description:
Full re-ingest of the task-manager repository.

1. Purges all existing pgvector chunks and Neo4j nodes for task-manager
2. Walks the repo, processes Java / YAML / SQL / Markdown files
3. Saves ClassNode + MethodNode graph to Neo4j
4. Embeds CODE and DOCUMENTATION chunks into pgvector

**Note:** Takes several minutes — embedding is the bottleneck.

Incremental ingestion — only processes files whose SHA-256 hash changed since the last run. Much faster after the initial full ingest.

**Response:** `{ serviceName, added, modified, deleted, unchanged, totalChanged }`

item.name: Query — Raw Retrieval
item.description: GET /api/retrieve — simple vector similarity search, no intent classification.

request.description: Raw cosine-similarity search for task creation logic.
Raw vector search for JWT/auth-related code.

query.value: role based access control ADMIN REPORTER REPORTEE

request.description: Raw vector search for RBAC logic.

item.name: Query — Intent Based
item.description: POST /api/query — classifies intent, then dispatches to vector search + Neo4j graph traversal. Returns structured results, no LLM call.

request.description:
Expected intent: **FIND_IMPLEMENTATION**

Returns CODE chunks from TaskService showing task creation logic.

Expected intent: **FIND_IMPLEMENTATION**

Returns chunks about invitation creation, token generation, and acceptance.

Expected intent: **TRACE_CALLERS**

Returns `callers` list from Neo4j CALLS relationships.

item.name: Trace Call Chain — what does register call

request.description:
Expected intent: **TRACE_CALL_CHAIN**

Returns `callChain` — downstream methods called from the registration endpoint.

Expected intent: **FIND_ENDPOINTS**

Returns `endpointMethods` — all @PostMapping, @GetMapping, @PatchMapping, @DeleteMapping handlers from Neo4j.

item.name: Find Configuration — MongoDB and JWT config

request.description:
Expected intent: **FIND_CONFIGURATION**

Returns CONFIG chunks from application.yml / application.properties.

Expected intent: **IMPACT_ANALYSIS**

Returns `impactedClasses` — classes that depend on TaskService.

Expected intent: **DEBUG_ERROR**

Returns CODE chunks relevant to role-based authorization checking.

Expected intent: **UNDERSTAND_BUSINESS_RULE**

Returns chunks explaining ADMIN / REPORTER / REPORTEE role permissions.
Expected: **400 Bad Request** — `query` must not be blank.
Expected: **400 Bad Request** — `serviceName` must not be blank.

item.name: Ask — LLM Synthesis
item.description:
POST /api/ask — full RAG pipeline: retrieve → assemble context → Ollama LLM → natural language answer.

Requires Ollama running with the configured model (default: llama3).

**Response includes:** answer, synthesized flag, intent, modelUsed, contextChunksUsed, and full nested retrieval result.

item.name: Ask — How does task creation work

request.description: Full RAG answer about task creation flow — from controller through service to repository.

item.name: Ask — How does JWT authentication work

request.description: Full RAG answer about the JWT auth flow — registration, login, token creation, filter chain validation.
TRACE_CALLERS intent with LLM synthesis. Explains the caller chain for task assignment.
FIND_ENDPOINTS with LLM synthesis. Returns a human-readable description of every controller endpoint.

item.name: Ask — Invitation flow end to end

request.description: Full RAG answer tracing the invitation lifecycle — send, email token, accept, member creation.
UNDERSTAND_BUSINESS_RULE intent. LLM explains role permissions in plain business terms.

item.name: Ask — Why 403 on task status change

request.description: DEBUG_ERROR with LLM synthesis. Diagnoses the authorization check path and explains when/why 403 is thrown.
IMPACT_ANALYSIS with LLM synthesis. Lists dependent classes grouped by layer.
Full RAG answer about the activity tracking system — what triggers activity logs, what metadata is stored.

No-context fallback. LLM is NOT called — returns `synthesized: false` with guidance message.

Expected: `{ "synthesized": false, "answer": "No relevant code found...", "modelUsed": "none" }`
Expected: **400 Bad Request** — `query` must not be blank.
